pageContext.html:
erosion

april 2026

smoothed rock worn down in time
by little jostles, wind and grime
left too long to sink and set
ten years time and never left.

jagged? fragile? brave, no more.
soul yet locked in fragile core
of words too fell to speak aloud
yet keys they'd be to stand up proud
and fall in love and freedom see.
A boulder turned a cloud.
